title: treleasea pumila
intro: Treleasea pumila, also known as Dwarf Treleasea or Trelease's Dwarf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is native to Mexico and is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Treleasea pumila can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
